design_principles: Domain layer is pure semantics — no I/O, no frameworks, no LLM calls
Aggregates enforce their own invariants through guarded behavioral methods
Value objects are immutable and self-validating on construction
Domain events are immutable facts — past tense, minimal payload
Process entities enforce state transition guards at all times — illegal transitions raise domain errors
Identity references (User, School) are loaded externally and passed in — not resolved inside domain objects
Cross-context value objects (RetrievedEvidence, RetrievalQuery) flow as function return values — no shared imports between domain layers

aggregates.name: ConversationSession
aggregates.description: Lifecycle owner of a multi-turn user conversation. Manages session state transitions from creation to closure. Enforces turn sequencing and session-level invariants. All other workflows execute inside it.

transitions.note: Rollback: restores session to idle when a turn crashes mid-execution. Allows the user to retry without starting a new session.

illegal_transitions: created → active  (must initialize first — enforces INV-CS-2)
active → closed   (must return to idle first — enforces INV-CS-2)
any → initializing (only from created — enforces INV-CS-2)

behavior.note: Rollback. Called by ProcessTurnUseCase when any exception escapes the TurnGraph execution. No domain event emitted — a failed turn is not a completed turn. Session returns to idle so the user can retry.

invariants_enforced: INV-CS-1 — status must be one of the five valid states
INV-CS-6 — user_id must be provided (pre-resolved externally, never null)

entities.name: ConversationHistory
entities.description: Persisted record of a single conversation message. Loaded at session initialization to restore prior context. Appended on each completed turn. Belongs to the user — not part of the ConversationSession consistency boundary. Created once, never mutated. Append-only log.
entities.scope: loaded at session init; persisted per turn via IConversationHistoryRepository

invariants_ensured: sender must be a valid SenderType

value_objects.name: User
value_objects.description: Identity reference for the interacting user. Pre-resolved by the external auth API before any request. Loaded from DB at session init. Never authenticated here. Immutable reference to User entity in external Auth BC — never created or mutated in this context.
value_objects.scope: read-only identity reference — loaded externally, passed into session init

properties.name: name
properties.note: Display name loaded from Users.name; used for LLM personalization in user-facing responses

value_objects.name: School
value_objects.description: The school the user supports. Loaded from DB at session init. Provides the fundraising anchor passed to DecisionContext as a SchoolAnchor. Immutable reference to School entity in external Master Data BC — never created or mutated in this context.
value_objects.scope: read-only identity reference — loaded at session init, passed to BC-2 as SchoolAnchor

value_objects.name: Intent
value_objects.description: Classified purpose of a user message turn. Immutable once created. Drives routing through the turn pipeline and constrains retrieval source selection.
validation: value must be a valid IntentType

value_objects.name: AssistantResponse
value_objects.description: Grounded response returned to the caller. Immutable once generated. Must be backed by retrieved evidence. Carries quality scores. A response that fails score thresholds must not be delivered — a fallback is returned instead.

factory.method: AssistantResponse.create(text, intent_answered, groundedness_score, relevance_score, evidence_source_ids) → AssistantResponse
factory.note: Validates scores on construction. is_fallback defaults to False.

invariants_enforced: INV-AR-1 — every response grounded in evidence (groundedness_score >= threshold)
INV-AR-5 — response not returned if either score is below threshold
INV-AR-6 — relevance_score computed via reverse-question; grounded-but-wrong answer is still a failure

ports.name: IResponseGenerator
operations: generate(message: str, evidence: RetrievedEvidence, context_snapshot: dict) → AssistantResponse

ports.name: IResponseEvaluator
operations: evaluate(response: AssistantResponse, intent: Intent, evidence: RetrievedEvidence) → AssistantResponse
ports.note: Returns a new immutable AssistantResponse enriched with computed groundedness_score and relevance_score

ports.name: IDecisionIntelligenceService
operations: pre_seed_context(session_id: str, school_id: str, school_name: str, purchase_signals: list[dict]) → None
process_turn(session_id: str, intent: str, message: str, turn_number: int) → RetrievedEvidence
ports.note: Cross-context port to COMP-2. Defined in BC-1 application layer. Implemented in shell as a thin adapter that calls COMP-2 use cases.

ports.name: IPurchaseHistoryRepository
ports.note: Optional signal. Returns empty list gracefully if no records exist.

aggregates.name: DecisionContext
aggregates.description: The core intelligence asset of the system. Progressively accumulates user preference signals across turns. Signals are never removed — accumulation is strictly monotonic. School anchor is always present. State drives retrieval readiness. Enforces all context lifecycle invariants.

properties.name: school_anchor
properties.note: pre-seeded at session init; never null; never changes

properties.name: _pending_retrieval_intent
properties.note: Saves the original retrieval intent when a clarification gap is detected. Cleared once retrieval is successfully resumed. Never set to a non-retrieval intent (INV-PRI-1, INV-PRI-2).

transitions.trigger: add_signal() — additional signals added, gaps remain
mark_ready() — external gap evaluation passed by application layer

illegal_transitions: empty → ready      (must pass through partial — enforces INV-DC-3)

guards: signal not already present by key+value pair (idempotent)
side_effects: transitions empty → partial if first signal

behavior.description: Returns True if status is ready or enriched (INV-DC-4)
Returns True if status is partial and identified_gaps is non-empty
Saves the original retrieval intent when a clarification gap is detected. Must be called before emitting clarification_needed=True so the intent can be resumed after the user answers.
guards: intent must be one of the retrieval intents: product_inquiry, referral_question (INV-PRI-1)

behavior.description: Clears the saved retrieval intent once retrieval has been successfully resumed. Must be called atomically when retrieval proceeds (INV-PRI-2).
Read-only property. Returns the saved retrieval intent, or None if no pending intent is stored.
Returns a read-only primitive snapshot of current context state for query construction and response generation. Exposes no mutable internals. Includes pending_retrieval_intent.

factory.produces: DecisionContext in empty state with school pre-seeded
invariants_ensured: school_anchor must not be null (enforces INV-DC-2)

invariants_enforced: INV-DC-1 — status must be one of four valid states
INV-DC-2 — school_anchor always present and never null
INV-DC-3 — state never regresses; transition guards enforced
INV-DC-5 — signals accumulate monotonically; add_signal never removes
INV-DC-6 — ready/enriched requires at least one signal beyond school anchor
INV-PRI-1 — pending_retrieval_intent only set to a retrieval intent value; never to general_question, clarification_response, ambiguous, or out_of_scope
INV-PRI-2 — pending_retrieval_intent cleared atomically when retrieval is resumed; must not persist across a completed retrieval turn

value_objects.name: RetrievalQuery
value_objects.description: Context-enriched query artifact constructed from the accumulated DecisionContext and the classified Intent. Drives knowledge source routing. Must never be constructed from the raw user message alone. Immutable; created once via factory method; represents point-in-time context snapshot passed to knowledge retrieval.

properties.name: query_text
properties.note: enriched, constructed text — not raw user message

factory.method: RetrievalQuery.from_context(session_id: str, query_text: str, intent: IntentType, context_status: ContextStatus) → RetrievalQuery
validation_rules: INV-RQ-1 — query_text must be constructed from context, not raw message (application layer responsibility; factory accepts only enriched text)
INV-RQ-2 — source_target derived from intent (product_inquiry → product_catalog; referral_question → referral_program_rules)

validation: source_target must be one of: product_catalog, referral_program_rules
originating_intent must be one of the retrieval intents (product_inquiry, referral_question)

metadata.lifecycle: created once, never mutated, eventually discarded

value_objects.name: PreferenceSignal
value_objects.description: A single user preference or constraint extracted from one conversation turn. Immutable once created. Accumulated monotonically into DecisionContext.

value_objects.name: RetrievedEvidence
value_objects.description: Immutable result of a retrieval execution. Carries retrieved content chunks and context quality scores evaluated before injection into generation. If recall falls below threshold, retrieval must be retried — this value object must not proceed to generation.

nested_value_objects.name: EvidenceChunk
nested_value_objects.description: A single retrieved content chunk from the knowledge store.

invariants_enforced: INV-RE-1 — context_recall_score computed after every retrieval, before injection
INV-RE-2 — context_precision_score computed after every retrieval, before injection
INV-RE-3 — if recall < threshold, retrieval must be retried; do not pass to generation
INV-RE-4 — evidence with failed quality scores must not reach generation

value_objects.name: SchoolAnchor
value_objects.description: Immutable value object carrying the school identity pre-seeded into DecisionContext at session init. The fundraising anchor — always present, never changes.

domain_events.name: GapDetected
domain_events.emitted_by: DecisionContext.record_gap_evaluation() — conditional on gaps being non-empty

ports.name: IEvidenceEvaluator
ports.note: Returns evidence enriched with context_recall_score and context_precision_score. Enforces INV-RE-1, INV-RE-2.

ports.name: IKnowledgeRetrievalService
ports.note: Cross-context port to COMP-3. Defined in BC-2 application layer. Implemented in shell as a thin adapter.

bounded_contexts.name: knowledge_retrieval
bounded_contexts.note: No aggregates. Products and ReferralRules are read-only external reference value objects retrieved by semantic similarity. They are never created, mutated, or owned by this BC.

value_objects.name: Product
value_objects.description: Immutable external reference to a purchasable catalog item. Retrieved by semantic relevance against the product_catalog vector store. Never invented by the LLM — only returned from retrieval. Sourced from external knowledge base; never created or mutated by this BC.
validation_rules: INV-AR-2 — product recommendations must cite only products returned by retrieval

value_objects.name: ReferralRule
value_objects.description: Immutable external reference to a platform-defined referral program rule. Retrieved by semantic relevance against the referral_program_rules vector store. Never rewritten by the LLM. Sourced from external knowledge base; never created or mutated by this BC.
validation_rules: INV-AR-3 — referral guidance derived exclusively from retrieved rules

ports.name: IProductRepository
ports.note: Implemented by a vector store adapter in infrastructure layer

ports.name: IReferralRuleRepository
ports.note: Implemented by a vector store adapter in infrastructure layer

folder_structure.note: Each bounded context domain layer has its own module folder with subfolders by artifact type. Ports are co-located with the layer that defines the contract.

files: value_objects/retrieved_evidence.py — local BC-3 definition; includes EvidenceChunk

cross_context_flows.note: Value objects cross context boundaries as function return values — never as shared domain imports.

flows.mechanism: direct port call; primitive DTOs only — no BC-1 domain objects imported into BC-2

flows.payload: RetrievalQuery passed as function argument to IKnowledgeRetrievalService.retrieve()
flows.mechanism: direct port call; BC-2 RetrievalQuery is passed by value

flows.payload: RetrievedEvidence (scored — context_recall_score and context_precision_score populated by IEvidenceEvaluator)

invariant_enforcement_map.note: Domain layer enforces structural and state invariants. Application layer enforces workflow ordering, cross-boundary consistency, and quality gate invariants.

domain_layer.enforced_by: ConversationSession transition guards — illegal transitions raise domain error
ConversationSession.create() — user_id must not be null
DecisionContext.create() — school_anchor must not be null
DecisionContext transition guards — regression raises domain error
RetrievalQuery.from_context() factory — source_target derived from intent
RetrievalQuery.from_context() factory — source_target validated against intent
AssistantResponse.create() — validates score ranges on construction

application_layer.enforced_by: StartSessionUseCase — school pre-seeded before first turn
ProcessTurnUseCase — turn rejected if session not in active state
StartSessionUseCase — checks for existing active/idle session before creating new one
StartSessionUseCase — enforces one active/idle session per user
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph — retrieval only activates when intent is product_inquiry/referral_question AND context is ready/enriched
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph — query_text constructed from context snapshot, not raw message
TurnGraph evaluate_response node — groundedness_score must reach threshold
IResponseGenerator — LLM grounded on retrieved product evidence only
IResponseGenerator — LLM grounded on retrieved referral rules only
IResponseGenerator prompt — school reference injected into generation context
TurnGraph evaluate_response node — route to fallback if scores fail
IResponseEvaluator — relevance_score via reverse-question technique
IEvidenceEvaluator — context_recall_score computed after retrieval
IEvidenceEvaluator — context_precision_score computed after retrieval
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph retry edge — recall below threshold triggers query refinement
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph — evidence with failed scores does not reach generation
TurnGraph — classify_intent node executes before any other node
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph — context update before query construction
TurnGraph — process_decision_intelligence node before generate_response
TurnGraph — no bypass path; decision intelligence executes on every turn
DecisionIntelligenceSubgraph — evaluate_evidence_quality node after retrieval, before returning evidence
TurnGraph — evaluate_response node after generation, before return
